failure_movement.justification: Empty cluster: predicted 1-3, actual 10→2 (confirmed). Wrong cluster: predicted +1-3 growth, actual 9→8 (wrong direction). Unknown: predicted shrink from 39 to 32-36, but baseline was 34 not 39; actual 34→33 (directionally right, magnitude overestimated). Correct: +10 actual vs predicted +3-7 (underpredicted magnitude).

trace_movement.justification: Completion tokens rose 187→233 (directionally correct, max hits 1024 cap). Total consumption barely changed (169k vs predicted 175-190k, clearly wrong). Two-tier hit-length differentiation unverifiable from stored retrieved data — identical avg lengths. ** disappearance unverifiable same reason. Partial credit only.

side_effects.justification: Both predicted list-task regressions confirmed: 3249768e and 8cf51dda both flipped passed→failed. Token-consumption risk flagged as 175-190k was incorrect (actual ~169k, flat). Two confirmed regression calls earn strong credit; the token alarm was a false alarm.
